title: The Paper Moon Conspiracy
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A film archivist finds a murder hidden inside a lunar training reel.
long_description:
The Paper Moon Conspiracy follows Noel Ardent, an adult film archivist, through Cold War studio lots and aerospace archives as a film archivist finds a murder hidden inside a lunar training reel. The inquiry moves through offices, sealed rooms, public hearings, and physical evidence, keeping its suspense grounded in work, speech, and consequence.

As Vera Pike, Samir Holt, and June Sable help test the record, Director Hal Kroll tries to turn delay into truth. The novel is clean adult suspense about institutions, memory, and the cost of naming what everyone was paid not to see.
